feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)

entry.title: in orbit; in conjunction
entry.summary:
Author: northernsealight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,633Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: "Tell me, what is it you plan to dowith your one wild and precious life?" —Mary Oliver, The Summer Day_________ or: how lucky and cursed you are to love, pine for, and hate the same person for 10 years (one day 2025! au).

  • Im not even joking when I saw slow burn I keep saying every thing I write is slow burn but this is geniunly painful to read and write

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 122,253Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 733

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: How We Breathe (Save For You)
entry.summary:
Author: dino_soup

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,052Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 4

Summary: A classic retelling of Jason's resurrection, but the reader is the reason he died in the first place.Being depressed about it ain't going to bring him back. Nothing will ever bring him back. At least, that's what everyone believes. a series of ups and downs when Jason suddenly returns seven years after his death. (I'm bad at summaries?) (I actually like this fic, so hopefully every few days there'll be a new chapter!)

entry.title: Even the Sun Cries Sometimes (Full Fic)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,768Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 42

Summary: “You’re not smoking again are you?” You take a drag as you contemplate your reply, watching the smoke coil above you and float away. “It’s been a long day, Steph.” “Talk to me.” You shake your head despite her not being able to see it. “No, it’s alright. I just didn’t sleep well last night. Tired is all.” She hums as if she doesn’t believe you. “You don’t need me to tell you that smoking is bad for you.” You scoff. “If smoking was so bad, God wouldn’t have made tobacco. In fact, if he wants me to stop smoking, may he give me a sign right now, and I swear I will quit for good!” “You don’t even believe in-” *BANG!*, *CRASH!* *THUD!* OR: I wrote a hurt/comfort one shot between Jason Todd and the Reader, and then got inspo to turn it into a full fic. Thank you flamingoesareawesome

entry.summary:
Author: notsoshyval

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 631Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10
